title: taraxacum duplex
intro: Taraxacum duplex, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum duplex include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve digestion. Taraxacum duplex can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
